Script to Hijack Website for Malicious Redirect
===========================================

This script is intended for use in a controlled lab environment only. Do not use this script on the internet or in production systems without proper authorization and precautions.

Overview
--------

This script allows you to intercept user traffic on a specified website, redirect the users to another site, and log the requests and responses. This can be useful for simulating attacks on web applications and identifying vulnerabilities.

Prerequisites
-------------

* Python 3.x (tested with 3.7)
* Requests library installed (`pip install requests`)
* A web server running (such as Apache

# extract the title and link elements from the <head> element
